settings.title: Jewellery Cleaning and Care Set
settings.text: Essential Tools for Keeping Your Jewellery Sparkling Clean

Introducing our Vegan-Friendly Jewellery Polishing Spray Set – the ultimate solution for maintaining the brilliance of your treasured jewellery pieces while aligning with your compassionate lifestyle. Crafted with a commitment to cruelty-free and eco-conscious principles, this comprehensive set provides everything you need to keep your jewellery sparkling clean and looking its best.

settings.textbox_subheading: But that's not all – our set goes beyond the spray, offering additional tools for comprehensive jewellery care. Included in the set are a soft and luxurious cleaning cloth, perfect for gently buffing away fingerprints and smudges, and a delicate brush designed to reach intricate details and crevices with ease.

settings.text: With our Vegan-Friendly Jewellery Polishing Spray Set, you can trust that your jewellery will receive the utmost care and attention it deserves, all while staying true to your commitment to sustainability and compassion. Elevate your jewellery care routine with this thoughtfully curated set, where eco-friendly solutions meet the timeless elegance of your favourite accessories.

settings.heading: Instructions for using the Vegan Polishing Spray Set:
settings.subheading:
1. Prepare Your Jewellery:
  • Ensure that your jewellery is free from any large debris or dirt particles. If necessary, gently rinse your jewellery under lukewarm water and pat dry with a soft cloth before beginning the cleaning process.

2. Spray Application:

  • Hold the Vegan-Friendly Jewellery Polishing Spray bottle. When you press it, it comes out as a foam so make sure you put the jewellery in any form of container and use the spray.
  • Spray a light foam evenly over the surface of the jewellery pieces you wish to clean.
  • Wait for 15 seconds to allow the spray to penetrate and loosen any dirt or grime.

3. Brush Cleaning:

  • After 15 seconds, take the included brush from the Vegan Polishing Spray Set.
  • Gently use the brush to agitate the sprayed areas, focusing on intricate details and hard-to-reach spots.
  • Be gentle to avoid scratching delicate surfaces and continue brushing until the dirt is loosened.

4. Cloth Buffing:

  • Once the brushing is complete, take the soft cleaning cloth from the set.
  • Starting with the outside of the polishing cloth (Black part), gently buff the surface using circular motions to remove any remaining residue and bring out the shine.
  • Next, focus on the white inner part of the cloth for a final polish, using the same gentle circular motions to achieve a lustrous finish.

5. Inspect and Repeat (if necessary):

  • After cleaning and buffing, inspect your jewellery under good lighting to ensure that it's thoroughly clean and polished.
  • If there are still areas that require attention, repeat the spraying, brushing, and buffing process as needed until your jewellery looks pristine.

6. Final Touches:

  • Once you're satisfied with the cleanliness and shine of your jewellery, store it in a clean and dry place to prevent dust and dirt from accumulating.

7. Maintenance:

  • For regular maintenance, use the Vegan Polishing Spray Set as needed to keep your jewellery looking its best.
  • Remember to clean the brush and cloth after several uses to remove any dirt or residue and ensure their effectiveness for future cleanings.
With these simple instructions, you can confidently use the Vegan Polishing Spray Set to clean and maintain your jewellery while adhering to your ethical and eco-conscious values.
